title: The Effect of Medicaid Reimbursement Rates on Nursing Home Staffing

analysis.legacy_reason: Requires custom preprocessing (weekly→quarterly aggregation, merge with ccn_high_mcaid_il.csv, bubble-period exclusion, multi-scenario high/low heterogeneity) implemented in results/254/id254_script.R. Template produces only TWFE+CS-NT for main scenario; bundled results.csv retains the full 10-column schema including heterogeneity estimates.

notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED — custom discretized treatment, no standard ES. Gandhi et al. (2024). DISCRETIZED treatment (created by analyst, not paper). Paper uses continuous treatment (illinois * post) for main spec and heterogeneity by Medicaid share (high_mcaid_il / low_mcaid_il) as robustness. We create binary treatment: high-Medicaid IL facilities (342 CCNs, above-median Medicaid share) = treated, low-Medicaid IL facilities (308 CCNs) = control. Single treatment date: Q3 2022 (first post-bubble quarter). Bubble (Jan-Jun 2022) excluded. Weekly data aggregated to quarterly for CS. Custom script: id254_script.R.
